process_route: air plasma spray or electron beam physical vapor deposition with bond coat
known_strengths: reduces metal temperature; mature turbine coating family; repairable in established routes
known_watch_outs: spallation; bond coat oxidation; thermal cycling durability; CMAS attack
applicability_guardrails: Use only with substrate and bond coat compatibility stated.

coating_role: oxidation and water vapor recession protection
process_route: slurry; plasma spray; physical vapor deposition variants
known_strengths: protects silicon-based ceramics from recession; enables CMC hot-section use
known_watch_outs: thermal expansion mismatch; water vapor durability; coating defects and repair limits
applicability_guardrails: Use for silicon-based ceramics or CMCs with environment-specific validation.

process_route: thermal spray; PVD; HVOF depending on coating chemistry
known_strengths: surface hardness; fretting and abrasion resistance; localized protection
known_watch_outs: adhesion; residual stress; fatigue debit; edge durability
applicability_guardrails: Use where substrate fatigue and adhesion testing are part of validation.
